rationale: Both papers center on how SKU availability influences consumer choice: the citing paper models demand contingent on changing assortments/availability, and the cited paper reports effects of availability consistency on utility and choice. That topical overlap makes a substantive role plausible (theory/mechanism background), but the provided match evidence is only a bare DOI reference with no in-text citation context. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but importance is not yet clear.
